impact: This gives the PP&D daemon a deterministic recovery path when progress says all parsed tasks are complete but the plan has expanded goals: append the next narrow fixture-first tranche instead of repeatedly repairing stale completed progress.
summary: Add fixture-first no-eligible-task replanning guidance for completed boards with expanded goals.
target_task: Task checkbox-80: Task checkbox-75: Add daemon no-eligible-task replanning guidance that treats `complete == task_count` with expanded goals as a prompt to append the next fixture-first tranche instead of invoking repeated repair on stale progress.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
